title: Bosnia and Herzegovina at the 2026 World Cup: roster, list, players, group and schedule
original_text: Bosnia and Herzegovina face Switzerland today in each team’s second match of the 2026 World Cup in Los Angeles. Canada 1-1 Bosnia and Herzegovina 3:00 p.m. ET - Switzerland vs Bosnia and Herzegovina 3:00 p.m. ET - Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar Get closer to the game!
